series_metadata.series_description: The record series pertains to, and consists of any agency documents, policy statements and guidelines for complaints filed against Hearing Officers as outlined in Memo R12. The series is inclusive of the complaint, agency correspondence, agency response, and all documents related specifically to the complaint. Note: Any disciplinary action taken related and subsequent to a hearing officer complaint will not be maintained in this record.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: all relevant/related materials three years from date that complaint was closed ; Electronic: all relevant/related materials three years from date that complaint was closed
